outputs: Return path cannot be calculated while the route remembers you arriving.
Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
warnings: If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
The phrase “low-clearance” here means “safe to see”, not “useful to solve anything”.
Do not correct grammar in terminal captures. The terminal is allowed to make mistakes when it is afraid of being too specific.
